name: Oren Shur, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Fwd: Iowa polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Bernie's outspending us. | Friend --

I run paid advertising for the campaign, so it’s my job to figure out how we compete with Bernie Sanders on the airwaves. Right now, he’s outspending us on TV, which means that he’s making his case to more voters right as they’re starting to pay attention to this race -- and this morning he released his first negative ad attacking Hillary, even though Bernie’s often said he never has and never would run a negative ad in his career.

**[Well, he’s running one now. And we need to do something about it.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ0NzUwMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxNzU2OTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It’s no coincidence that the polls are getting tighter just as his ad spending goes up. We need to close the gap to make sure Iowa and New Hampshire voters know the truth about Hillary.

**Can you chip in $1 right now to stand with Hillary? We’re counting on grassroots donors like you to bring this home:**
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ0NzUwMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxNzU2OTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Oren

Oren Shur
Paid Media Director
Hillary for America

\----------Forwarded message----------
From: Robby Mook
Subject: Iowa polls:

Friend --

There are not one, but _two_ new public polls out this week that have us down in Iowa.

Now, you should always take public polling with a grain of salt. But if you thought this race wasn't going to be close, well, it is. This isn't me claiming the sky is falling -- these are just the facts.

Voters will caucus in Iowa in 19 days, and the Sanders campaign is outspending us on TV. It's going to take everyone on this team to stand together and show what a strong organization we've built. We can and will win this nomination if we keep our heads down and stay focused on what matters: the people counting on us and on Hillary.

**Hillary's been fighting for families for decades -- if you're with her, this is the time to show it. It's not about the money. It's about digging deep and doing what it takes so we can make a difference for this country. Chip in $1 now, and let’s go win this thing:**

Robby

**Every negative attack line invented by the _The New York Times_ and _The Washington Post_ was repeated by Donald Trump and Marco Rubio tonight** \-- doing Hillary's bidding.

Friend, tonight is the most important night of my campaign, and right now, [**I am personally asking if you'll be part of it.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32893351:W7pg9_yN_:m:1:1104269936:1293E69A4A77A52804BE9FD6C8E39AB7:r)

**The world is watching to see how I fare against the barrage of attacks from my opponents and the liberal media...** like _The New York Times_.

My opponents and the liberal media elites decided their best strategy to defeat me was through continued personal attacks on me and my family -- repeating again and again their misleading, distorted attacks.

As you may have read by now, _The New York Times_ published a disgraceful story last night. It was an attempted hatchet job aimed at misleading and distracting the American people in a shameful attempt to ensure my defeat in tonight's debate.

Others on the stage with me tonight thought their best strategy was to question my citizenship -- even quoting one of Hillary Clinton's biggest supporters -- in a last ditch attempt to derail my winning campaign.

**Tonight, more time was spent on misleading and false attacks, and it only benefited Hillary Clinton at the great expense of the American people.**

But as you saw tonight, I fought back with everything I had -- with the truth on our side -- and we won.

If you agree with me that _The New York Times_ and the _The Washington Post_ are doing the bidding of Hillary Clinton and the national Democrats -- join my campaign tonight.

[**Click here to make an urgent contribution to my campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32893351:W7pg9_yN_:m:1:1104269936:1293E69A4A77A52804BE9FD6C8E39AB7:r)

You see: _I'm not a BILLIONAIRE, and the special interest lobbyist and Washington Cartel are not supporting me_ \-- they're all supporting my opponents.

So, I'm counting on you Friend.

**[Can I ask you tonight to make an urgent gift of at least $25?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32893351:W7pg9_yN_:m:1:1104269936:1293E69A4A77A52804BE9FD6C8E39AB7:r)**

[**OR, if you can afford more, will you make an urgent gift of $100 or even $500?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32893350:W7pg9_yN_:m:1:1104269936:1293E69A4A77A52804BE9FD6C8E39AB7:r)

If you want to defend the U.S. Constitution rather than see who can launch the most attacks...I'm your candidate.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

subject: They can't ignore us now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

Last night was just a glimpse of what the
Washington machine has to fear.
They kept me off stage for the debate -- they
thought they could silence our message -- and we showed them they
can't.
We're growing stronger every day.
Will you help my campaign grow even stronger
by donating to our Fight The Media Blackout moneybomb today?
I took my message straight to the people on
Twitter and Periscope and we created a wave the media couldn't
possibly ignore.
While the candidates slugged it out on stage
answering questions from moderators, I was taking questions
directly from voters. Reminding everyone again that VOTERS will
decide this election. Not the media. Not the establishment.
We're showing the naysayers that they cannot
defeat the liberty movement.
I'm so glad you all could join me to get our
message out.
I've been fighting for a more diverse party
that promotes a diversity of opinion and dissent. And while it's
clear the media and the Washington machine do not stand with me,
it's even more clear that with supporters like you I have the
strength to stand against their arbitrary rules and status quo.
We set a $250,000 goal to help us fight the
media blackout.
We made a big step in the right direction
last - but I still need your help, Patriot.
Will you help me reach my moneybomb goal and
send an even bigger message to the media?
Any donation will make a big difference.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Rand Paul
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

The Washington Machine and GOP insiders are
doing everything they can to weaken liberty's hold in the
Republican Party.

But it isn't working. As hard as they try,
they can't stop my message of liberty and limited government --
even after excluding me from last night's debate.

Patriot, will you agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or $10 help me keep up my momentum?

As Time Magazine reported this morning:

"Amongst all candidates, regardless of party,
Paul added the second most followers, according to Twitter
Government, and #RandRally was the fourth highest trending
hashtag in the United States."

Without my voice on the GOP debate stage, all
the American people saw was flip-floppers calling out other
candidates for changing their positions -- and arguing about how
best to start World War III and shred the Fourth Amendment.

Is it any wonder more and more Americans are
growing fed up with politics-as-usual?

Is it any wonder polls show Americans are
angry with BOTH parties?

We need a President who will follow the
Constitution.

If elected, that's exactly what I plan to do.

That's why my support is growing despite
insider attempts to black me out.

But there are only just over two weeks until
the Iowa Caucuses, so this is a critical time.

Please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Friend, I tried to reach you last night, but it was late. I'm
worried you might have missed my email (below). It's important
you read it.

-Ted

Sent from my iPhone

Friend, did you see this?

It's getting bad.

Time is running short before the Iowa Caucus and we are being
attacked from every angle by the liberal media.

Look no further then this morning's cover of the New York Daily
News telling Ted to "Drop Dead!"

This is the lowest attack against Ted to date and the troubling
fact is it's not going to stop.

Ted and I expect an all-out assault from the media elites and we
don't have much time before Iowa to let these attacks go
unanswered.

I am asking you personally to stand with Ted and me in defense of

prevent Ted from becoming the next President of the United
States.

Warmly,
Heidi Cruz

difference to the cause.

body:
Dear Patriot,

The message of liberty is growing.
Democrats AND Republicans don't want to hear
it, but the strong conservative message of liberty is resonating
everywhere. And it's popular.
People do not trust the government to run
things. They don't want the government to run their lives. They
don't believe in the Federal Reserve. And they're sick and tired
of the wars.
As I mentioned on MSNBC yesterday, the
liberty movement is stronger than ever. The mainstream media just
doesn't want you to hear it.

We've watched the establishment and the media
try to shut me down in 2008 and 2012.
We saw yesterday that they tried to block
Rand too.
I'm not even surprised.
But when the media wants us to believe the
liberty movement is dying? Well, I'll stand up to that and speak
out. It's simply not true.
We're here, and we're stronger than ever,
rallied behind Rand. Can you contribute to $25 to Rand's Fight
The Media Blackout Moneybomb to help us prove it?
In the past few decades we've seen the end of
facist and communist regimes. And in the next few? We could see
the end of terrible economic policies, an end to invasion of
civil liberties.

But only if we get Rand into the White House.

Rand is in it to win it. And he's not going
to stay quiet. He's going to do what he's done for years: stand
up for liberty and the Constitution.
I stand with Rand in 2016. He's the only one
for the job.
Will you stand with him too?

In Liberty,
Ron Paul

subject: In debate last night, "Christie was witty and direct"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45823706:JtM1ICrNs:m:1:1516426255:97C7458EBC7456BCA64EA2187ABD8CFE:r) |
| | | As you've seen by now, Christie had a another commanding debate performance where he talked directly to the American people about the issues and kept his eye on the ball - defeating Hillary Clinton.
> [ICYMI - _Washington Post 's _George Will - Keep an eye on Chris Christie](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45823707:JtM1ICrNs:m:1:1516426255:97C7458EBC7456BCA64EA2187ABD8CFE:r)
> **CNN 's Jeremy Diamond**: "Winners: Chris Christie - Christie delivered the strongest debate performance of the establishment candidates as he touted his record as a governor and let his no-nonsense New Jersey spirit shine. A one-liner against Rubio is sure to get some play...It's notable that Christie's best moments came as he battled Rubio, as the two have been sparring for support in New Hampshire where Christie is on the rise." **_The Hill 's _Niall Stanage**: "WINNERS: New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie - Christie has shone in almost all of the debates, his pugnacity helping him to come back from near-death, politically-speaking. He has been on the rise in New Hampshire polls. **_Des Moines Register 's_ Jennifer Jacobs**: "Christie was witty and direct...Rubio learned fast not to go after Christie, the Iowans said."
He also had the top performing moment of the debate on Twitter when he called out the president for being a "petulant child", pointed out Americans have already rejected his policies and "we are going to kick your rear end out of the White House come this fall." [Christie: President Obama Is A Petulant Child](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45823708:JtM1ICrNs:m:1:1516426255:97C7458EBC7456BCA64EA2187ABD8CFE:r)
> _" I hope the President is watching tonight because here's what I'd like to tell him. Mr. President, we're not against you, we're against your policies. When you became President, you had a democratic congress and a filibuster-proof democratic Senate. You had only 21 republican governors in this country, and now after seven years of your policies, we have the biggest majority we've had since the 1920s in the house, a republican majority in the senate, and 31 out of 50 republican governors. The American people have rejected your agenda and now you're trying to go around it. That's not right. It's not constitutional, and we are going to kick your rear end out of the White House come this fall."_
Christie also shut down the continued disingenuous attacks from Marco Rubio on the debate stage last night. As the Governor said this morning, "if you are going to take shots at me, at least look me in the eye." [MSNBC's Morning Joe - If You're Going To Take Shots At Me, At Least Look Me In The Eye](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45823709:JtM1ICrNs:m:1:1516426255:97C7458EBC7456BCA64EA2187ABD8CFE:r)
[Fox News' Fox and Friends - When Someone Just Makes Stuff Up, There's No Reason To Get Upset](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45823710:JtM1ICrNs:m:1:1516426255:97C7458EBC7456BCA64EA2187ABD8CFE:r) Christie is en route to Iowa today for a four day swing through the state. [His full Iowa itinerary can be found here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45823711:JtM1ICrNs:m:1:1516426255:97C7458EBC7456BCA64EA2187ABD8CFE:r) Thanks, Sam

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Ted Strickland is not having a good year
body:
| [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/keep_the_momentum?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bad_year&n=1) Peter -- 2016 hasn't been kind to Ted Strickland. When he began the year hiding from his primary opponent, Ohio media tagged him as the invisible candidate. When he was caught misleading voters, he was taken to task. And when he announced another disappointing fundraising haul, the former governor's own allies expressed concern. 2016 is turning out to be no better than 2015 for Ted Strickland.

But Peter, thanks to supporters like you, Rob is having an incredible 2016. Earlier this month, we announced an Ohio record by raising nearly $10,000,000 in 2015. We've contacted nearly 1,100,000 voters since May 1st, and this week while the media called Ted Strickland's campaign invisible, [our dedicated team of Winter Warriors](facebook.com/robportman/videos/vb.419067244881558/894513254003619/?type=2&theater) were knocking doors in the snow! [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/keep_the_momentum?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bad_year&n=2) Despite Strickland's early missteps, national Democrats have identified Ohio as an essential component of their effort to capture the Senate Majority and the White House. And we know they'll do everything they can to regain power.

Peter, our campaign is off to a great start but there is so much more work to do. [Can I count on you to give $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help Rob keep the momentum?](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/keep_the_momentum?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bad_year&n=3) Thanks again for your support! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/keep_the_momentum?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bad_year&n=4) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bad_year&n=5)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bad_year&n=6)[

name: Zack Exley, Bernie 2016
subject: Step 1: breathe. Step 2: organize.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
Take a deep breath. Iowa is days away -- the first contest in the 2016 Democratic primary. The latest poll there has Bernie just a few points behind. Too much is at stake for us to fall short.
Bernie wants to talk to you -- directly in a live streamed conversation on Saturday, January 23 \-- about what it's going to take from all of us to pull this off. And of course he wants to talk to you about the issues we are fighting for, and what's at stake in this election.
**Will you attend aJanuary 23 live event to hear from Bernie? **
**Host: **Fellow Bernie Supporter in Silver Spring
**What:** Special Live Address to Bernie Supporters
**Where:** Eleven55 Ripley Sky Lounge
Sky Lounge 1155 Ripley Street
Silver Spring, MD 20910
**When:** Saturday, January 23rd
5:30 pm EST
**[GET MORE INFO & RSVP](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rpyz)**
[**There are lots more events happening - click here to find more on our map.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f14ab/2539382099/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=LIVESTREAM&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")
More than 1,000 gracious hosts have already planned public events where you can watch Bernie live with fellow supporters from your neighborhood or town -- and plug in to volunteer efforts.
No matter where you live, you can join the Fight for the First Fifteen -- the fifteen critical states starting with Iowa on February 1 on through New Hampshire, Nevada, South Carolina, and the eleven Super Tuesday states voting on March 1.
Already, Bernie's volunteer voter contact organization is calling a lot of people every day. That's amazing. But we need to make tens of thousands of calls every day to counter the wave of negative attacks that are coming.
We need each and every one of you! We really do! If you were waiting to volunteer, now's the time -- and January 23 is the place to plug in. If you've been volunteering already now's the time to redouble your efforts.
**[Find more events on our map for Bernie's live video address on January 23.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f14a8/2539382099/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&eventtype=LIVESTREAM&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")**
It is such an honor to be working with you in this incredible movement. See you on the 23rd!
Zack Exley
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f14a9/2539382099/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em160115-event")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f1456/2539382099/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f1457/2539382099/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f1454/2539382099/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a17/43f17890/45b4615c/620f1455/2539382099/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Fill this vacancy now

body:
| Friends,

If you don't know who Eric Fanning is, you should.

President Obama nominated Eric to be Army Secretary back in September. **If confirmed, he would be the first openly gay Army Secretary in history.**

But what did Republicans decide to do? Obstruct the process, of course. The GOP-controlled Senate opted to play political games and hold Eric's nomination for months in protest over the President's campaign to close Guantanamo Bay.

Sen. McCain just scheduled a hearing for next Thursday.

Eric spent his career serving in senior Defense Department roles. He should breeze through a Senate confirmation hearing -- if Republicans don't get in the way again.

[**Tell the GOP to stop politicizing federal appointments. Sign this petition to get Eric Fanning confirmed.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2270/738133e4/3b4186d9/7f838282/881251664/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160116a")

Thank you,

Patrick
